message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings and Int/BigInt type mismatch in fixture_matrix

- fixture_matrix.rs: Handle SqlValue::Int(i32) in count_table() since
  SQLite's read_column returns Int for small values, not BigInt. Add
  clippy allow directives for test-only code.
- sustained_load.rs: Fix redundant field names, add missing clippy allows
  for items_after_statements, struct_excessive_bools, missing_const_for_fn.
- Close br-3vwi.8 (interaction model track) and br-3vwi.9 (perf track)
  as all children are done.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
